arts.ttl: Man United Bruno Fernandes makes Alejandro Garnacho claim after forward's low-key celebration vs. Leicester
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes explains Alejandro Garnacho's low-key celebration after scoring against Leicester City on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Alejandro Garnacho thinks he has ‘lost support of fans’ as muted celebration is explained
arts.sum: Garnacho started the 3-0 win over Leicester on the bench

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes receives a framed shirt from Sir Jim Ratcliffe to mark Man United landmark - before opening the scoring against Leicester
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes was awarded a framed shirt to mark his 250th appearances for Manchester United ahead of their clash with Leicester.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes drops huge Ruud van Nistelrooy hint on eve of Ruben Amorim's Man Utd arrival
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy earned a third win in four matches as Manchester United's interim manager but his future remains up in the air with Ruben Amorim to join as head coach

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim faces Marcus Rashford dilemma as Man Utd star's woes continue
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was brought off after just 57 minutes during Manchester United's 3-0 win against Leicester City, as he failed to score for the eighth Premier League game in a row

arts.ttl: With Ruben Amorim’s arrival imminent, Bruno Fernandes proves why he is Man Utd’s most valuable player
arts.sum: Man Utd 3-0 Leicester: The Red Devils captain was involved in all three goals as Ruud van Nistelrooy ended his time as interim boss with another win

arts.ttl: Manchester United next five fixtures compared to Tottenham and rivals after Leicester win
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as goals from Bruno Fernandes and Alejandro Garnacho gave Ruud van Nistelrooy's side a 3-0 win over Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes drops hint over Ruud van Nistelrooy's future at Manchester United
arts.sum: Man Utd secured a 3-0 win against Leicester in the Premier League and reflected on the performance.

arts.ttl: Utd thrash Leicester as Amorim era set to begin
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes bagged one goal and created two more in his team's spirited 3-0 Premier League victory over Leicester City on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd see off Leicester in Ruud van Nistelrooy’s final game as interim manager
arts.sum: New United head coach Ruben Amorim is taking over from the caretaker boss.
